questions: Year-by-year debt and finance-lease maturity schedule with annual interest expense, weighted-average coupon, and covenant headroom reconciled to the FY2025 10-K debt footnote, so a credit-tightening stress case can be run on equity recovery versus dilution.

responses.question: Year-by-year debt and finance-lease maturity schedule with annual interest expense, weighted-average coupon, and covenant headroom reconciled to the FY2025 10-K debt footnote, so a credit-tightening stress case can be run on equity recovery versus dilution.
responses.answer: The frozen packet cannot supply the requested credit bridge. Filing-locked balance-sheet anchors from FY2025 10-K and Q1 2026 10-Q are present: cash $902 million, long-term debt and finance leases $25,254 million, current debt and finance leases $3,753 million (total ~$29,007 million), net debt ~$28,105 million, stockholders' equity $3,727 million, operating income $1,467 million, operating cash flow $3,099 million, and capital spending $3,779 million (exceeding OCF). The net_financial_claims proof uses these point-in-time balances only, with low/high haircuts of ±5% on debt and +15% on cash and no distressed refinancing rate. No frozen artifact extracts year-by-year debt or finance-lease maturities beyond the current $3,753 million bucket, annual interest expense, weighted-average coupon, covenant terms, or revolver availability. filing_facts_2026-07-21.json parses revenue, operating income, OCF, capex, cash, and long-term debt tags but not InterestExpense or a maturity table; management_facts_2026-07-21.json has document_count zero. lenses.json marks_credit_cycle key_metrics show interest_coverage, maturity_wall, and net_debt_ebitda all null. The cycle_leverage_reserve component (−$9.00 per share base) is a judgment reserve for fuel, recession, and leverage stress and is not tied to interest burden or maturity concentration. Near-term liquidity arithmetic is thin—$902 million cash against $3,753 million current maturities while FY2025 capex exceeded OCF—but without interest expense and covenant headroom the packet cannot compute interest coverage, cannot stress-refinance tranches at higher spreads, and cannot certify equity recovery versus dilutive issuance under credit tightening. Marks credit-cycle defer remains warranted.
